narration_text:
If God feels silent at two a.m., listen to this sixty-second reset.

When I am afraid, I put my trust in You. Psalm fifty-six, verse three.
Whisper it on your breath.
In: I trust You.
Out: I release control.

Peace I leave with you. My peace I give you. John fourteen, verse twenty-seven.
In: Your peace is here.
Out: Not as the world gives.

The mind governed by the Spirit is life and peace. Romans eight, verse six.
In: Spirit, lead my thoughts.
Out: Give me life and peace.

Reframe it: My body is alarmed, but I am not abandoned.
Jesus, sit with me in this night and settle my soul. Amen.
